question_html:
Explain the following statement in your own words.

“Education also fosters critical thinking.”
solution_html:
The given line has been collected from the lesson ‘Why Education’ of the text book. Education plays a crucial role in developing critical thinking by interacting individuals to diverse perspectives and complex situations, challenging them to analyze and evaluate problems systematically. It encourages problem-solving and analytical skills, helping students to approach issues methodically and draw informed conclusions. By fostering curiosity and skepticism, education promotes questioning and inquiry, essentials for critical thinking. It also enhances communication skills, enabling clear articulation and effective argumentation and encourages reflective thinking, allowing individuals to align their beliefs with new knowledge. Thus, education equips people with the tools needed to navigate and make informed decisions in a complex world.

Marks Distribution:

01 mark for mentioning education helps develop critical thinking and skills such as analyzing and evaluating problems systematically, fostering problem-solving.

0.5 mark for mentioning education encourages curiosity.

01 mark for mentioning education equips individuals with the tools necessary to navigate a complex world and make informed decisions.

[N.B: 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]

question_html:
Correct the problems.

We can visit the museum, attend a concert, or went to the park this weekend. The athlete is known for his speed, agility, and strong. The options are to stay at home, go to a movie, or dining out. She is both a talented writer and accomplished painter. His hobbies include reading, paint, and playing the piano.
solution_html:
We can visit the museum, attend a concert, or go to the park this weekend. The athlete is known for his speed, agility, and strength. The options are to stay at home, go to a movie, or dine out. She is both a talented writer and an accomplished painter. His hobbies include reading, painting, and playing the piano.

Mark Distribution:

(0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks for solving the problems.
